title: cenchrus shaanxiensis
intro: Cenchrus shaanxiensis, also known as the Shaanxi Broomgrass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus shaanxiensis include its ability to alleviate fever, relieve pain, and reduce swelling, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Cenchrus shaanxiensis is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
